name: chem1_end1
note: Chemistry FAIL ending (soot), 20 frames @10FPS (2.0s — frame count padded 1.25x so realtime playback feels like 0.8x speed). Black smoke erupts from the flask; when it clears her face is covered in black soot with stunned tiny dot eyes; she gives one small cough, hides the flask and beaker behind her back, pulls out a yellow frilled handkerchief and wipes her face clean. FRAME 0 must match frame 0 of chem1_loop exactly (flask with magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, beaker with cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass). LAST FRAME must be a clean-faced neutral stand with empty hands at her sides (matches the idle base pose) — the soot must be COMPLETELY gone by the final frame. Props rules same as the loop; liquid levels never change.
frames: Pose: base pose with the first sign of trouble: standing upright, feet close together, the Erlenmeyer flask of glowing magenta-pink liquid at chest height in the hand on the LEFT side of the image, the beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, both opaque pale-tinted glass — and one thin wisp of DARK GRAY smoke curling up out of the flask mouth. Her calm smile faltering, one eyebrow rising as she notices. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the wisp thickening: two or three curls of dark gray smoke now rising from the Erlenmeyer flask mouth, drifting upward past her chin. Same prop positions (flask at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image), liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. She pulls her chin back slightly, eyes flicking down at the flask with dawning worry, mouth a small uneasy line. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: smoke building: a thick column of dark charcoal-gray smoke puffing up from the Erlenmeyer flask mouth (flask still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass). She leans her head back away from the smoke, eyes going wide, mouth a worried wobbly line. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: POOF, key frame: a big soft cartoon cloud of black-gray smoke bursting from the flask and billowing up around her head and shoulders, partially covering her face, small puff clouds flying outward. She flinches, shoulders up, eyes squeezed shut, still gripping the flask (LEFT side of the image) and beaker (RIGHT side of the image) at the same heights, liquid levels unchanged. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the smoke starting to thin and drift upward, revealing her face now SMUDGED WITH BLACK SOOT — dark sooty patches on her cheeks, nose and forehead, a little on her blonde bangs. Eyes just reopening as tiny stunned dots. Flask of magenta-pink liquid still at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker of cyan-blue liquid at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: smoke fully cleared, stunned freeze, key frame: her face covered in black soot smudges, expression completely blank and dumbfounded — TINY BEAN-DOT EYES (two small black dots), a tiny flat mouth, faint drop-shadow lines over her forehead. Body stiff and perfectly still, flask (LEFT side of the image) and beaker (RIGHT side of the image) held at the same heights, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: holding the stunned freeze: identical dumbfounded pose — soot-covered face, tiny bean-dot eyes, tiny flat mouth — with a single last little puff of gray smoke rising off the top of her head. Flask at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker at shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together, body stiff. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the freeze breaking with a slow blink: same soot-covered stunned face, but the tiny bean-dot eyes closing in one slow deadpan blink, head tipping a millimeter forward, the last smoke puff dissolving above her head. Flask (LEFT side of the image) and beaker (RIGHT side of the image) unmoved, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: a small cough 'kehok!': doubling forward slightly from the waist, eyes squeezed shut, mouth open in a little cough with two tiny gray puff clouds beside it, the hand on the RIGHT side of the image (still holding the beaker of cyan-blue liquid) raised loosely in front of her mouth, the flask of magenta-pink liquid kept at chest height on the LEFT side of the image. Soot still all over her face. Liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: a second smaller cough: still bent slightly forward, shoulders hopping with one more gentle cough, a single tiny gray puff beside her mouth, the beaker hand still loosely in front of her lips on the RIGHT side of the image, flask steady at chest height on the LEFT side of the image. Soot-covered face, eyes still squeezed shut. Liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: recovering from the cough: straightening back upright, eyes reopening halfway with a sheepish embarrassed look, soot still covering her cheeks and nose, faint blush visible under the soot. Flask at chest height on the LEFT side of the image, beaker lowering from her mouth back toward shoulder height on the RIGHT side of the image, liquid levels unchanged, opaque glass. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: hiding the evidence: both arms swinging back behind her body, the flask and the beaker disappearing behind her back, elbows poking out at her sides. Sheepish guilty expression on her soot-covered face, eyes darting to the side, small embarrassed pout. Feet close together, body upright. No props visible in front. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: props hidden: both hands fully behind her back, shoulders slightly hunched, soot-smudged face with an awkward apologetic smile, eyes glancing up and away, a bead of sweat beside her temple. Feet close together, body upright. No props visible. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the handkerchief appears: the hand on the RIGHT side of the image coming out from behind her back holding a small pastel-yellow handkerchief with a frilly lace trim, raising it toward her face; the other hand stays behind her back. Face still covered in soot, eyes turning toward the handkerchief with relief. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: wiping, first pass: the yellow frilled handkerchief pressed against the cheek on the RIGHT side of the image, wiping in a small circular motion — that cheek now noticeably CLEANER while the other cheek, nose and forehead still have soot smudges. Eyes closed gently, concentrating on the wipe, the other hand still behind her back. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: wiping, second pass: the handkerchief now wiping across her nose and the cheek on the LEFT side of the image — most of the soot GONE, only a couple of faint gray smudges left near her hairline. Content relieved expression, eyes still gently closed. The other hand behind her back. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: wiping, third pass along her hairline: the yellow frilled handkerchief brushing the last faint gray smudges off her forehead and bangs — her face now almost spotless, just one tiny gray dot left on her chin. Eyes peeking open, expression brightening. The other hand behind her back. Feet close together. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: the last dab: the handkerchief dabbing her chin — her face now COMPLETELY CLEAN, no soot anywhere, cheeks pink and fresh. Eyes open again, bright and relieved, small happy sigh with a tiny puff. The other hand behind her back. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: tucking the handkerchief away: the hand on the RIGHT side of the image swinging back behind her body with the yellow frilled handkerchief, both hands now behind her back for a moment, face fully clean, sheepish but recovered smile, shoulders relaxing. Feet close together, body upright. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.

Pose: FINAL FRAME — clean neutral stand matching the idle base pose: standing upright and relaxed, both arms resting naturally at her sides with empty open hands, no props visible, face completely clean with a soft slightly-embarrassed smile, eyes bright. Feet close together under her hips. The small lemon-slice hair clip stays on the same side of her bangs as in the reference image, do not mirror the character.
